title: AN ACT AMENDING SUB-ITEM (w), ITEM 2, SUBSECTION (a), TITLE H, SECTION ONE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINE HUNDRED TWENTY.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2517 / 51 OG No. 7, 3386 (July, 1955)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1306, June 16, 1955 ]

AN ACT AMENDING SUB-ITEM (

w

), ITEM 2, SUBSECTION (

a

), TITLE H, SECTION ONE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINE HUNDRED TWENTY.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Sub-item (

w

), item 2, subsection (

a

), title H, section one of Republic Act Numbered Nine hundred twenty, is amended to read as follows:

"(

w

)

Masalasa River Irrigation System,

Tarlac ...........................................

P30,000.00

"(

w-1

)

Bamban River Irrigation System,

Tarlac .................................................

10,000.00

"(

w-2

)

Cutcut River Irrigation System,

Tarlac .................................................

15,000.00

"(

w-3

)

Caut-Bantog-Balanoy-San Roque

communal Irrigation System.................

20,044.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 16, 1955.
